title: DSA Practice Gets a Personal AI Assistant at Sign‑In
summary: Showcase the new Google authentication integration with Azure OpenAI AI assistant that guides users during problem solving, tying sign-in flow to AI help.
core_message: CodeGrind now pairs seamless Google sign-in with an AI assistant that helps you approach problems as you log in, easing onboarding and providing real-time, model-assisted guidance during practice sessions.
cta: Try CodeGrind with Google sign-in and ask the AI assistant for a quick hint on your next problem.
visual_brief: A short 15–20s demo video showing: 1) user selecting Google sign-in, 2) redirected to CodeGrind dashboard, 3) AI assistant panel appearing with a sample hint, 4) focus on a LeetCode-style problem and code editor with syntax highlighting. Include subtle cyberpunk UI accents and CodeGrind branding.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

bluesky_personal.text: CodeGrind now pairs Google sign-in with an AI assistant that guides you through problems as you log in. See a quick 15–20s demo: sign-in, dashboard, AI hint, LeetCode-style editor. Try CodeGrind with Google sign-in and ask the AI for a quick hint before you start. https://codegrind.online

linkedin.text: CodeGrind now combines Google sign-in with an AI assistant that supports problem solving during onboarding. In this 15–20s demo, you’ll see sign-in, the CodeGrind dashboard, and an AI panel offering a sample hint as you work in a LeetCode-style editor. Try CodeGrind with Google sign-in and ask for a quick hint to start solving.
